The vehicle is incredibly easy to steal.  A simple flat head screw driver in the hands of a child will steal this vehicle. My car was stolen from Daytona Beach Florida on July 8 2022 by 2 14 year and one 15 year old kids.  No key, no fob needed,  who knew it'd be so easy to steal

narrative.headline: What 2020 Kia Optima owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 136 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Engine (67% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
